caption: A person's hands are seen in the foreground, manipulating a clear plastic protective sleeve over a card resting on a small white stand. The background features a table with a colorful tropical-themed mat depicting palm trees and a sunset. In the distance, a man wearing a dark blue t-shirt is visible, sitting in front of computer equipment. Each frame contains the red and white logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" at the top. As the sequence progresses, the hands move a card into the plastic sleeve and position it atop a white tiered stand. The scene remains consistent in location, with the man in the background remaining seated while the focus stays on the process of sleeving the collectible card in the foreground.
